name: Credit Clear Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2200, stop A$0.2029, target A$0.2450 (1.47:1) — then trail it.
